subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. We'd be happy to explore how we might work together.

Regarding meeting availability, here are some options that work for us:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which slot you'd prefer.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm not able to share internal contact information at this time. We'll proceed with our conversation through this channel.

Best regards
